summary: Iteration 17 testing covered: (1) Chat response truncation (no mid-word cuts), (2) Multilingual chat in 8 languages, (3) Gender switching between Miron/Oksana in new sessions, (4) Confidentiality answer based on SYSTEM_PROMPT section 7, (5) At-rest Fernet encryption (ENC1:: prefix verified in MongoDB, decrypted on /chat/history), (6) Backward-compat for legacy plaintext rows, (7) TTS for male/female voices in ru+en (audio/mpeg, valid MP3 header, >1KB). All 10 backend tests PASS. Frontend smoke passed: Miron greeting, send message, switch to Oksana shows fresh greeting with cleared history, click on already-active avatar is a no-op.

integration_issues.issue: Console error 'TTS playback error: Failed to execute postMessage on Window: Request object could not be cloned' appears after sending a chat message. Audio playback still works via blob fallback. This is a pre-existing issue reported in iteration 16.

action_items: Pre-existing: Fix MSE fallback postMessage error in useAudioStream.js (non-blocking, blob fallback works)
critical_code_review_comments: crypto_utils.py: correctly uses Fernet with ENC1:: prefix; decrypt falls back to raw value for legacy plaintext — idempotent and safe.
chat.py _truncate_to_sentence(): correctly handles finish_reason=='length' — tested 10 messages across short/medium/long modes, all end with proper punctuation (including CJK ?。 and Arabic ؟).
chat.py _init_session(): persona directive prepended to SYSTEM_PROMPT for correct Russian gender forms — verified both male and female forms are used correctly.
config.py SYSTEM_PROMPT §7 КОНФИДЕНЦИАЛЬНОСТЬ: response correctly explains privacy (confirmed: 'защищ', 'зашифр', 'между нами', 'только ты' keywords appear in AI reply).
/api/chat/history correctly decrypts both encrypted and legacy plaintext records.
ChatHeader.jsx: both avatars have no disabled attribute — always clickable (verified).
ChatPage.jsx handleVoiceSelect(): correctly ignores click on already-active avatar AND clears history via startNewSession() on switch (verified via UI test).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 smoke scenarios verified: Miron greeting, send, switch to Oksana with cleared history, no-op on active avatar re-click)

test_credentials.test_users: Created on demand via POST /api/auth/register with TEST_iter17_<uuid>@example.com

seed_data_creation: Per-module fresh user created via /api/auth/register; quota reset via direct MongoDB update before each test to avoid free_messages_count cap; legacy plaintext record inserted directly and cleaned up in backward-compat test.

mocked_apis.fish_audio_tts: LIVE (voice_id 7a98513e... for female confirmed, returns valid MP3)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified: chat no longer truncates mid-word across short/medium/long modes and 8 languages; new Oksana voice ID 7a98513e3a7d439682fa68f8d4da34c0 works in TTS; at-rest Fernet encryption (ENC1::) is applied to chat_messages.user_message and chat_messages.ai_response, and users.session_notes; decrypt_text is backward-compatible. Gender switch via voice=male/female in a fresh session_id yields correct Russian gender forms. Frontend UI: both avatars always clickable; switching triggers startNewSession() and fresh greeting from translations-extra.getGreeting(lang, voice). Pre-existing low-priority frontend TTS MSE postMessage error persists. Test quota reset fixture resets free_messages_count/minutes_left in MongoDB so chat tests don't hit tariff prompt.

features_tested.1_chat_no_mid_word_truncation: PASS (10 prompts, all end with .!?… or CJK/Arabic equivalents)
features_tested.2_multilingual: PASS (ru, en, es, fr, de, zh, ar, hi — all return non-empty replies ending with language-appropriate punctuation)
features_tested.3_gender_switching: PASS (Miron uses masculine forms, Oksana uses feminine forms; different session_ids simulate startNewSession)
features_tested.4_confidentiality_prompt: PASS (AI answer contains ≥2 privacy keywords from: конфиден, защищ, зашифр, между, только, никто, доступ, безопас, личн)
features_tested.5_at_rest_encryption_db: PASS (raw MongoDB chat_messages.user_message & ai_response start with ENC1::; plaintext does not leak)
features_tested.6_at_rest_encryption_api: PASS (/api/chat/history/{sid} returns decrypted plaintext, no ENC1:: prefix)
features_tested.7_encryption_backward_compat: PASS (legacy plaintext row inserted directly is returned as-is via /chat/history)
features_tested.12_frontend_chat_flow: PASS (register → /chat → click Miron → greeting → send 'Привет как дела?' → AI reply received → click Oksana → new Oksana greeting on screen, 'как дела' removed from history → click Oksana again → messages unchanged)
